# Yuuyami Doori Tankentai

[The Horror Masterpiece That Never Left Japan | Yuuyami Doori Tankentai (PS1)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TMrL8nKJGQw&pp=2AbHPg%3D%3D)

I’ve never played this game (apparently there isn’t an English version) but I’ve watched the excellent https://www.youtube.com/@dungeonchill video of the game, which covers the game in great detail.

<aside>
💡

I marked this as both roaming and stationary because the characters explore various sections of the city, yet never leave the city (other than some supernatural spirited-away alternate dimensions / dream sequences).

</aside>
